critical_issues.impact: Clients see security warning, immediate trust loss, high bounce rate
critical_issues.solution: Implement SSL/HTTPS using Cloudflare + GitHub Pages/Vercel

critical_issues.impact: Cannot showcase capabilities, prospects leave without understanding value
critical_issues.solution: Fix or replace with video/screenshots + CTA

high_priority.impact: Visitors don't know what action to take
high_priority.solution: Add prominent "Request Demo" and "Contact Us" buttons

high_priority.impact: Losing potential clients who aren't ready to contact
Poor user experience, lower search rankings
high_priority.solution: Optimize images, minify assets, enable compression

medium_priority.solution: Add title, description, Open Graph tags
Add client logos, testimonials, case studies
Add Google Analytics 4, LinkedIn Insight Tag

ssl_fix_guide.title: Kgotla AI Website SSL/HTTPS Fix Guide

steps.title: Configure Cloudflare SSL/TLS
instructions: Enable "Always Use HTTPS" in Edge Certificates
steps.verification: Visit http://kgotlaai.co.za - should redirect to https://kgotlaai.co.za

steps.title: Fix Mixed Content Issues
instructions: Clone your website repository: git clone https://github.com/kgotlaai/website.git
Replace all http:// with https:// in HTML/CSS/JS files
Check for protocol-relative URLs (//example.com) and ensure they work
Update any external resources (fonts, scripts, images) to use HTTPS
steps.verification: Use Chrome DevTools → Security tab to check for mixed content

steps.title: Enable HTTPS on GitHub Pages
instructions: Ensure custom domain is set to kgotlaai.co.za
steps.verification: GitHub Pages shows "Your site is published at https://kgotlaai.co.za"

steps.title: Configure Vercel SSL
instructions: Check that SSL certificate is auto-provisioned
steps.verification: Vercel dashboard shows SSL certificate as "Active"

steps.title: Verify DNS Configuration
instructions: Log in to Host Africa control panel
Ensure A records point to correct IPs:
Ensure CNAME record for www points to @ or appropriate target
Check TTL values (recommend 300 for quick changes)
steps.verification: Run: dig kgotlaai.co.za +short - should show correct IPs

demo_fix_guide.title: Fix Broken Demo Components

symptoms: Chat interface loads but no responses
fixes: Check if backend API is running (IBM watsonx, custom server)
Verify API endpoint URL in frontend code
Check API key/environment variables
Test API independently using curl or Postman
Add error handling and user-friendly error messages
Consider using a mock/demo mode for static sites
demo_issues.fallback_solution: Replace live demo with recorded video/screenshots until backend is fixed

fixes: Check if demo HTML/JS files exist in repository
Verify file paths in navigation links
Check build process includes demo files
Ensure case sensitivity matches (Demo.html vs demo.html)
Check browser console for JavaScript errors
Verify jQuery/other libraries loaded correctly
Check for JavaScript file loading over HTTP (mixed content)
Test in multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
Ensure event listeners attached after DOM loads
Optimize images (compress, use WebP format)
Lazy load demo components
Minify CSS/JS files
Use CDN for static assets
Add loading indicators

demo_fix_guide.quick_fix_template:
